description: Default gbrain source substitutions. Each entry turns a hardcoded model ID into an env-driven override so you can point gbrain at any Anthropic-compatible endpoint (MiniMax, self-hosted litellm, etc.). The `marker` must appear in `replace` but NOT in `find` — that's how the tool detects already-patched state so it's safe to re-run after every `gbrain upgrade`. Set `enabled: false` on any entry to keep the definition but stop applying it.
